title: Encrypt CUI on Mobile Devices and Mobile Computing Platforms
description: encrypt CUI on mobile devices and mobile computing platforms

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Encryption is Employed to Protect CUI on Mobile Devices
checks.purpose: Verify that BitLocker full disk encryption is enabled and enforced on all fixed and removable drives with TPM protection and a strong encryption algorithm via Group Policy

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Encryption is Employed to Protect CUI on Mobile Devices
checks.purpose: Verify that BitLocker is enabled on all fixed drives with TPM protection and AES-256 encryption enforced via Group Policy and that removable drive encryption is required before write access is granted

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Encryption is Employed to Protect CUI on Mobile Devices
checks.purpose: Verify that LUKS full disk encryption is active on system volumes, home directories are encrypted, and any removable media containing CUI uses LUKS or eCryptfs encryption

checks.name: Mobile Devices that Process Store or Transmit CUI are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of mobile devices that process store or transmit CUI is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Encryption is Employed to Protect CUI on Mobile Devices
checks.purpose: Verify that LUKS full disk encryption is active on system volumes, home directories are encrypted, and any removable media containing CUI uses LUKS or eCryptfs encryption
